_notes.auto_distill_every_turns: Stop hook auto-journal cycle. Lower = more frequent saves. 0 = disable.
_notes.srs_resurface_days: Days a file must be unseen before it's eligible for spaced resurfacing.
_notes.srs_resurface_prob: 1-in-N chance to resurface per prompt. Higher = less frequent.
_notes.auto_sync_on_session_start: Run mem-sync on every SessionStart. May add 1-3s latency.
_notes.auto_sync_on_stop: Run mem-sync after every Stop hook. Heavier; recommend false unless multi-device.
